title: UPDATE-001 — Rebranding ke PULSE & Penambahan Fitur AI
summary: SUPERSEDING patch ADR that rebrands SISKONKIN to PULSE, adds two AI MVP features (Inline Help, Comparative Analysis), and locks previously-open clarifications across docs 01-10.
scope: code/DB/container identifier renames (pulse-net, pulse-db, pulse-backend, pulse-frontend, pulse-redis, pulse-nginx)
design system Pulse Heartbeat signature animation
AI Feature #7 Inline Help (per-indikator cached context)

locked clarifications: no evidence upload, dynamic JSONB maturity schema, HCR deferred to Fase 6, skeuomorphic dark theme, Gemini Flash + Claude Sonnet routing, FastAPI+React 18+PostgreSQL 16+Docker Compose stack
notes: Manifest declared this as ADR with precedence=0 (highest, beats default ADR precedence). Status reads 'APPROVED' which is treated as Accepted -> locked=true. This document SUPERSEDES/AMENDS the existing 01-10 doc series rather than running parallel; downstream consumers must apply this patch on top of the base blueprint and prefer its decisions over any conflicting earlier statement.
